message:
feat(ftui): adaptive rendering with perf budgets and degradation-aware view (2noh9.4.8)

Wire FrameBudgetConfig (16ms/60fps PID degradation) into run_tui_ftui().
Make view() degrade gracefully across all 6 DegradationLevel steps:
- SimpleBorders: ASCII fallback when budget tight
- NoStyling: monochrome (all styles → plain)
- EssentialOnly: drop borders/chrome entirely
- Skeleton: skip content text, layout only
- Status footer shows "deg:<level>" when degraded

Bayesian diff strategy selection (RuntimeDiffConfig) already enabled
by ProgramConfig::fullscreen() defaults.

12 new tests: determinism, per-level panic safety, border/style/content
degradation assertions, status tag visibility, enum progression, config
defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
